name: BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using Hashes
notes: This building block looks for hashes in the UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - Hash reference set. Any known hashes related to WannaCry should be added to this table.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using Hashes on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
db_fields_used: SHA256 Hash, SHA1 Hash, MD5 Hash, File Hash, IMP Hash, Root Hash
conditions_text: when any of SHA256 Hash (custom), SHA1 Hash (custom), MD5 Hash (custom), File Hash (custom), IMP Hash (custom), Root Hash (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - Hash - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using Hashes on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when any of SHA256 Hash (custom), SHA1 Hash (custom), MD5 Hash (custom), File Hash (custom), IMP Hash (custom), Root Hash (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - Hash - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
